title: AwardingAgencyCode
description: The code associated with the department or independent agency of the federal government as used in the Treasury Account Fund Symbol (TAFS) that awards, executes, or is otherwise responsible for the transaction (as shown in the Federal Hierarchy).
x-domainValues:
Please follow these instructions:  See:
https://files.usaspending.gov/reference_data/agency_codes.csv
(CGAC AGENCY CODE and FREC columns). CGAC agency codes are consistent with the GSA IAE Federal Hierarchy from SAM.gov.
x-grantsActivityReferences: GRM.010.010 Grant Program Set-up and Maintenance
